Detailed Description

Internal VM class used for handling System's standard error and output streams

Creates a new stream for the specified resource

References available().

Member Function Documentation

int jelatine::VMResourceStream::available (  )  [inline]

Returns the number of bytes that can be read (or skipped over) from this input stream without blocking by the next caller of a method for this input stream. The next caller might be the same thread or another thread

Returns:
the number of bytes that can be read from this input stream without blocking

Reimplemented from java::io::InputStream.

native boolean jelatine::VMResourceStream::open (  ) 

Opens the resource stream

Returns:
true if the resource held by the object is available, false otherwise

Referenced by java::lang::Class::getResourceAsStream().

native int jelatine::VMResourceStream::read (  )  [virtual]

This method reads an unsigned byte from the input stream and returns it as an int in the range of 0-255. This method also will return -1 if the end of the stream has been reached.

This method will block until the byte can be read.

Returns:
The byte read or -1 if end of stream

Implements java::io::InputStream.
